chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 264 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 26-5-2025 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Naich, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General along with SSP Ghotki, SDPO Rounti, Zahid Mirani and Inspector Saifullah Ansari, SHO P.S Wasti Jiwan Shah -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Reports have been submitted by SSP Ghotki and SDPO, Rounti along with certain documents, which are taken on record. Inspector Saifullah Ansari submitted reply to show cause notice along with certain documents, which is taken on record. Upon perusal of statements / reports, submitted by the official respondents, it appears that there is matrimonial dispute in between the parties and due to such dispute, they are dragging each other in the litigation. Under the circumstances, the instant petition being meritless, is hereby dismissed. However, the applicant is at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of his grievance, in accordance with law. J U D G E Naveed Ali
